request_text: Process the last 5 days of GitHub issues (since 2026-06-19): parent under the correct epics, tag/label, cross-link related issues, and prioritize. Special focus: split-brain coordination + spec-kitty artifact read/write issues — parent them together under the existing split-brain epics (#1716 coordination-topology-coherence, #1878 resolver-strangler umbrella, #2068 3.2.x surface-authority meta-tracker); create an umbrella epic only if the existing ones are insufficient.
